_NmcEmergencySearchOutput.description:
Placeholder output schema for GovAPITool registration.

Real output shape is deferred until NMC auth is provisioned.
_NmcEmergencySearchOutput.title: _NmcEmergencySearchOutput

description:
Input schema for nmc_emergency_search.

Pydantic v2 strict model (extra='forbid', frozen=True).
All three fields are required; no defaults are provided so that the LLM
must explicitly supply values rather than silently relying on fallbacks.

lat.description: Latitude of the search origin in decimal degrees (WGS-84). Obtain from resolve_location(want='coords'). Example: 37.5665 for central Seoul.
lat.title: Lat

limit.description: Maximum number of nearest emergency rooms to return. Capped at 100 per NMC API contract. Example: 5 for the five nearest ERs.
limit.title: Limit

lon.description: Longitude of the search origin in decimal degrees (WGS-84). Obtain from resolve_location(want='coords'). Example: 126.9780 for central Seoul.
lon.title: Lon

title: nmc_emergency_search
